title: AgriFund
description: Agriculture-focused platform concept built to support farmers and agribusiness stakeholders with structured funding workflows and accessible project tracking.

title: Clothing Avenue
description: Fashion e-commerce iOS application focused on clean product browsing, mobile shopping flow, and a user-friendly storefront experience.

title: Stock Predictor
description: Data-driven forecasting project that explores stock price movement using historical market data, feature engineering, and machine learning models.
